message.content:
Thoroughly explore the apitable codebase at D:\project\pt-gitlab\apitable. I need to understand:

1. Top-level directory structure (ls the root)
2. Build system - look for package.json, pom.xml, build.gradle, Makefile, docker-compose files, etc.
3. Key configuration files (.cursorrules, .cursor/rules/, .github/copilot-instructions.md, README.md, CONTRIBUTING.md)
4. Architecture - what are the main modules/services (backend, frontend, etc.)
5. How to build, test, lint, and run the project
6. Tech stack (languages, frameworks, databases)
7. Any existing CLAUDE.md file

Be very thorough - read README.md, any Makefile, root package.json, and key build configs to understand the project deeply. Read the actual file contents, don't just list files.
